activity.description: Activity type name to execute. Must match a registered activity on the target task queue.

activity_id.description: Business identifier for this standalone activity execution. Must be unique among running activities.

task_queue.description: Task queue the activity is scheduled on.

args.description: Arguments to pass to the activity. JSON object — keys/values are forwarded to the activity function via the Temporal data converter. Omit for zero-arg activities.

start_to_close_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time of a single activity execution attempt in seconds. Defaults to 60s when omitted.
